hero.headline: Your Backyard, Built for Living
hero.subheadline: From custom pools to outdoor kitchens, our architects, builders, and artisans bring your vision to life under one roof. No subcontractors, no runaround -- just one team turning your yard into the place where your family makes memories.
checkmarks: One team from concept to completion

services.label: What We Build
services.headline: Custom Outdoor Spaces Built<br class="hidden md:block"> for How You Live
services.subtitle: Your backyard should work as hard as you do -- hosting dinners, splashing with the kids, or just unwinding after a long week. We design and build every element to fit your life.

cards.title: Custom In-Ground Pools
cards.description: Designed for Minnesota's seasons and your family's lifestyle. From lap pools to freeform retreats, every pool is a custom build from concept to first splash.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Bars
cards.description: Fully equipped cooking and entertaining spaces with grills, counters, sinks, and seating -- built to host everything from weeknight dinners to weekend parties.

cards.title: Pool Houses & Cabanas
cards.description: Custom pool house design and construction that blends seamlessly with your home. Storage, changing rooms, wet bars -- whatever your oasis needs.

cards.title: Decks, Patios & Porches
cards.description: Premium decking and patio hardscaping that expands your living space outdoors. Durable materials, expert craftsmanship, and designs that complement your home.

cards.title: Pergolas & Shade Structures
cards.description: Architectural pergolas and gazebos that add character, shade, and year-round comfort to your outdoor environment.

cards.title: Fire & Water Features
cards.description: Custom fire pits, fireplaces, fountains, and water features that create ambiance and transform your space into an evening destination.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Backyard

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Tell us how you want to live outdoors. Our design team visits your property, listens to your ideas, and creates a custom concept that fits your home, your lot, and your budget.

steps.title: We Design & Build It
steps.description: Our in-house architects draft your plans while our construction crew brings them to life. One team, one point of contact, no subcontractor headaches -- just a seamless build.

steps.title: Start Making Memories
steps.description: Your new outdoor space is ready. Fire up the grill, dive into the pool, gather around the fire pit. This is the backyard you always wanted -- and we built it to last.

about.label: Why Twin Cities Homeowners Choose Us
about.headline: One Team. One Vision. Your Dream Built Right.
about.description: Most companies sub out the work. We do it all in-house -- architects, builders, and artisans working together from day one. That means your pool matches your patio, your kitchen flows into your living space, and every detail connects. Serving Hugo and the greater Twin Cities metro, we understand Midwestern soil, climate, and how to build outdoor spaces that hold up through every season.

features.title: Full Design-Build In-House
features.description: Architects, builders, and artisans all under one roof. No subcontractors, no miscommunication -- just one team from blueprint to final walkthrough.

features.title: Built for Minnesota Seasons
features.description: We engineer every project for freeze-thaw cycles, heavy snow loads, and summer heat. Your outdoor space is built to perform year after year.

features.title: Seamless Start to Finish
features.description: One point of contact, one timeline, one vision. We guide you through every decision so the process feels easy and the result feels perfect.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed proposal upfront. No hidden fees, no change-order games -- just honest numbers for exceptional work.

guarantee.headline: Our "Built Right" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any element of your project does not meet the standards we agreed on, we come back and make it right at no additional cost. We stand behind every stone, every board, and every tile -- because your backyard is our reputation.

faqs.question: How long does a typical pool or outdoor living project take?
faqs.answer: Timelines vary by scope, but most custom pool builds take 8-12 weeks from breaking ground. Patios, kitchens, and smaller features often wrap in 2-4 weeks. We provide a detailed timeline during your design consultation so there are no surprises.

faqs.question: Do you handle the entire project or do you use subcontractors?
faqs.answer: Everything is done in-house. Our architects, builders, and artisans all work under one roof. That means better communication, tighter quality control, and a smoother experience for you from start to finish.

faqs.question: Can you work with my existing landscaping and structures?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our design team specializes in integrating new features with your existing home, deck, and yard. We will visit your property and create a plan that flows naturally with what is already there.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Hugo, Stillwater, Woodbury, Lake Elmo, North Oaks, Eagan, Mendota Heights, Minnetonka, Saint Paul, and communities throughout the greater Twin Cities metro area -- including Hudson, WI.

faqs.question: How do I get started?
faqs.answer: Just give us a call or fill out the form on this page. We will schedule a free design consultation at your home, walk your property, talk through your vision, and put together a custom proposal -- no pressure, no obligation.

testimonials.name: Catherine J.
testimonials.text: Asher Judd with Outdoor Innovations created an exceptional landscape design of the pool placement and subsequent hardscape that organically flowed with our home, deck, and yard. His teams thoughtfully, artistically, and precisely placed each piece with great care. We are thrilled with the result.

testimonials.name: Nathan M.
testimonials.text: The professionalism and quality of work were outstanding throughout the entire project. Communication was excellent from start to finish and the craftsmanship exceeded our expectations.

testimonials.name: Catherine R.
testimonials.text: We just finished a backyard pool project with Outdoor Innovations and it turned out absolutely beautiful! From the initial design to completion, the attention to detail and commitment to our vision truly set them apart.

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure design consultation. We will visit your property, listen to your vision, and put together a custom plan with transparent pricing.
